name: 夏日水果糖
short_description: 🍬 Summer Candy Adapted from Sweetheart Calculation, a Yuri interactive visual novel about "Day and Night Out of Sync." Two girls, living in different rhythms, exchange hearts through letters and fruit candies. A poignant summer tale of youth and hidden feelings. 📖 Credits Author: Li Jin / Catnip
detailed_description:
Summer Candy

(Adapted from the novel "Sweet Calculation")

Summer Candy is an interactive youth GL (Girls' Love) visual novel centered around the theme of "misplaced day and night." It tells a delicate story of two girls who were never meant to meet, connecting through exchange of fruit candies and handwritten letters.

📖 Original Authors

Li Jin (Heng Siyu) / Catnip

🌤 The Beginning

During her very last PE class before graduation, Lu Rijie tucked a piece of fruit candy and a confession note into her crush's desk.

However, the one who found the letter wasn't her crush, but Xia Yinhe, a girl from the night school.

A misdelivered letter causes the worlds of day and night to intertwine. Though they have never met face-to-face, they begin to find their way into each other’s hearts through the words left behind on paper.

✨ Game Features

  • 💌 A Letter-Based Romance: Experience the flutter of youth through short notes, replies, the agony of waiting, and the beauty of misunderstandings.

  • 🌙 Displaced Day & Night: One belongs to the sun, the other to the moon. They share the same desk, yet live in different worlds.

  • 🎧 Immersive Reading & Audio: A fusion of music and voice acting that feels like a summer whisper meant only for you.

  • 🧠 Interactive Choices: Your decisions will shape their understanding and emotional bond.

🎯 Recommended for Players Who:

  • Enjoy GL / Yuri / Sapphic romance.

  • Love Coming-of-Age stories with nuanced emotional depth.

  • Appreciate Author-involved projects with authentic creative vision.

  • Seek a Visual Novel / Kinetic Novel experience with a strong focus on atmosphere.

“What if a love letter was sent at the wrong time, but reached the right person?”

📌 Notes for Players

  • This is a story-driven experience focused on atmosphere and emotion. It features a deliberate, slow-burn pace—best enjoyed when you have a quiet moment to yourself.

  • Headphones are highly recommended to fully experience the immersive sound design and voice acting.

  • Special Note: Both original authors participated in the voice acting, giving the characters their true "voice" directly from the creators themselves.
